name: tripwire
description: Lint and coverage-probe Claude Code skills — does your skill trip on the right prompts?

scripts.build:action: esbuild src/action/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=action-dist/index.js
